findings.location: s3 — 登録するクラスのソースコード(HelloMessageProvider) / 登録するクラスのソースコード(HelloComponent)
findings.description: The Java source code examples for HelloMessageProvider and HelloComponent are omitted. These demonstrate the concrete implementation pattern for DI-registerable components: setter method naming convention (setHelloMessage, setHelloMessageProvider) and implicit default constructor. While the two requirements are stated textually, the code examples show what compliant component classes actually look like.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains full Java source for HelloMessageProvider (with setHelloMessage/getHelloMessage) and HelloComponent (with setHelloMessageProvider/printHello), presented as examples of registerable components.
